title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.33 — NEAL presets moved to the ARTIST section (correcting v0.4.32). The preset menu already has three sections — FACTORY / ARTIST / USER — via kFactoryRegistry, kArtistRegistry (was empty), and the user preset dir; loadById already maps id ranges across them. v0.4.32 wrongly put the 6 NEAL presets in kFactoryRegistry alongside the albums. Now: kFactoryRegistry = the 17 album presets only; kArtistRegistry = the 6 NEAL presets (DEF first). NEAL - DEF stays the first-open default (loadEmbeddedPreset stays symbol-based, section-independent) and its combo id is now kFactoryRegistrySize+1 (first artist slot) with a syncComboBox so the box shows it selected. The 6 NEAL files retagged sourceEra User preset -> Artist preset. VERIFY IN ABLETON: preset menu shows -- FACTORY -- (17 albums), -- ARTIST -- (6 NEAL, DEF first), -- USER --; a fresh instance opens on NEAL - DEF and the box reads NEAL - DEF. OPEN: painted-metal chassis fork; deferred patina; LIMITER rename.
